title: thinopyrum × duvalii
intro: Thinopyrum × duvalii, also known as Red Fescue, is a hybrid grass species within the Poaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Thinopyrum × duvalii can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
